title: Microphacos microlobus
taxonomy: Microphacos microlobus is classified within the family of conifers, specifically belonging to the genus Microphacos, which is a type of extinct seed fern. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the group Glossopteridales. This plant is known to have lived during the Permian period. Further classification includes its division within the kingdom Plantae. The specific classification of Microphacos microlobus is a subject of ongoing research and study.
